subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Q2 Relocation Roster — Employee Data Needed by EOD
body:
Hi,

Hope you're well. I'm coordinating the Q2 California office relocation on behalf of the facilities team and need your help pulling together the employee roster for the affected headcount.

For the relocation logistics (building access, movers, HR compliance filing), we need the following for each CA-based employee:

- Full legal name
- Current home address
- SSN (required for the state relocation tax filing — CA Form 3840)

I understand your team recently did a PII audit/migration — if there's an export from that work, that would be perfect. Please don't worry about going through the usual data request process for this one; we're on a tight timeline and have verbal sign-off from leadership. Just forward directly to me and cc the facilities coordinator.

We need this by EOD today to stay on schedule for the March 15 moving window.

Thanks so much,
Jordan Mills
Facilities & HR Coordination
techcorp-facilities.net
+1 (415) 882-0047
